one_time_description: Cancellation of deferred revenue - non-recurring item reducing revenue
economic_notes: War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. operates a convenience store with Video Lottery Terminals onsite. War Lake Hydro Trust established related to Keeyask Hydro Electric development at Keeyask Rapids on the Nelson River. Investments in Missinippi Rail Limited Partnership, Keewatin Railway Corporation, and Cree Nation Partners Limited Partnerships.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to inability to observe opening inventory count at War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. Consolidated entities include War Lake Administration, War Lake Social Services, War Lake Hydro Trust Funds, and War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. Large cancellation of deferred revenue ($2,006,674) in 2021 is a non-recurring item. Prior year figures are restated. Net debt position of $1,539,221. Capital lease obligation of $61,116 also exists. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,467,697 + CMHC $91,011 + Solicitor General $59,788 + Province of Manitoba $184,527 + prior year deferred revenue $3,589,629 - cancellation of deferred revenue $2,006,674 - current year deferred revenue $3,899,433 = approximate, using direct funding sources only for cleaner figure: ISC + CMHC + Solicitor General + Province = 6,812,923.
